title: Fig. 1   Fig. 2 D EMONSTRATION
subject: Mathematics
objective:
To draw a cumulative frequency curve
(or an ogive) of less than type.
Coloured chart paper, ruler, squared
paper, sketch pens, cellotape,
cutter, glue.
procedure:
1. Collect data on heights of the students of a school and make a frequency
distribution table, containing, say, five classes as given below:
Height   a-b   b-c   c-d   d-e   e-f
Frequency   f   1   f   2   f   3   f   4   f   5
2. Form a cumulative frequency table of less than type of the above data as
given below :
discussion:
These results may be used in finding the material required in making containers/
objects in the shape of a frustum of a cone and also to find their capacities.
168   Laboratory Manual
